problem_solved: Healthcare and social services operate in silos, making it impossible to track outcomes from social care referrals and coordinate whole-person care
solution_description: End-to-end platform coordinating whole-person care across healthcare, government, and community-based organizations. Closed-loop referral network with real-time coordination, outcome tracking, and data infrastructure for measuring social care impact
traction_signals: Trusted by thousands of organizations serving millions
Claims denial rate significantly below industry average
notes: Major competitor to Findhelp. Focus on outcome measurement and ROI tracking. Strong in government/public health sector. NowPow acquisition added community resource directory capabilities
